title: Entity
description: Something that has separate and distinct existence and objective or conceptual reality.

definitions.definition: Something that has separate and distinct existence and objective or conceptual reality.
Government or business organization that is formed to conduct business or represent the government of the day.
definitions.examples: CEOS Entities include Working Groups, Virtual Constellations, etc.
definitions.sources: - WGISS Shared Collection Lifecycle Management Principles for Earth Observation Data
